description: Agent skill for managing referral codes using the refcli CLI tool

evals.prompt: Add a new referral code 'FREESHIP' for domain 'example.com' with URL 'https://example.com/ref' using refcli
evals.expected_output: Executes refcli command with correct parameters and confirms creation
assertions: Includes required fields: code, url, domain

evals.prompt: Deactivate the referral code 'OLDCODE' with reason 'Expired offer' using refcli
evals.expected_output: Deactivates the code and confirms status change

evals.prompt: Search for active referral codes for domain 'trading212.com' using refcli
evals.expected_output: Returns list of matching referral codes with details
assertions: Formats output with code, URL, and status

evals.prompt: Run web research for referral codes on domain 'robinhood.com' with depth 'standard' using refcli
evals.expected_output: Executes research and displays discovered codes

evals.prompt: Handle error when trying to add a referral code without providing the required URL parameter
evals.expected_output: Displays helpful error message with usage instructions
assertions: Suggests next steps to fix the error
